updates.title: Real User Leaderboard!
updates.description: Compete with real users in your league! No more bots, just real progress and real competition.

updates.title: Earn XP Every Day
updates.description: Earn 5 XP for every task and 5 XP for completing a level. Level up faster and climb the ranks!

updates.title: Duolingo-Style Leaderboard
updates.description: Redesigned leaderboard with promotion zones, ranking colors, and a sticky user bar for easy tracking.

updates.title: XP Everywhere
updates.description: New XP stats on the home screen, consistency cards, and leaderboard for a clear sense of achievement.

updates.title: Smoother Experience
updates.description: Faster data syncing and smoother transitions between app screens for a more responsive feel.
